title: CallLint Evidence Subject
description: What identity evidence is gathered about (calllint.evidence-subject.v0). The stable, resolver-agnostic locator for a thing the Trust Index describes. See new11 P1 §4.1.

subjectType.description: The kind of subject. An unsupported type MUST yield an UNSUPPORTED_SUBJECT_TYPE gap, never a silent pass.

artifactDigest.description: Digest binding once the artifact identity is pinned; null until resolved.
